name: VCFight - Telegram VC-to-VC Audio Forwarding Userbot
description: Forwards live audio from one Telegram Voice Chat to another in real time, with configurable volume and bass.

BOT_TOKEN.description: BotFather token for the command-and-control bot

OWNER_ID.description: Telegram user ID allowed to control the bot

STRING_SESSION.description: Pyrogram string session for the assistant account (generate with gen_string.py)

LOGGER_GROUP.description: Group whose Voice Chat is the live audio source

PULSE_SINK_NAME.description: Name of the PulseAudio virtual sink bridge

WORK_DIR.description: Working directory for logs, pipes, and recordings
